coreSource: Official Steam RPG Maker MZ new-project corescript
method: Opened the isolated 1.10.0 project in the official RPG Maker MZ editor, enabled HybridTileGraft followed by HybridTileGraftSmokeProbe, started a new game, observed the green PASS banner, and retained the source-bound save/reset/load, cleanup, frame-timing, and benchmark marker.
